docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,483.44 FILED BY DRAKE, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT KUEHLER, EMILY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DOANLD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-13-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KUEHLER, EMILY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRAKE, MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUEHLER, EMILY $6,483.44 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,568.44, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KUEHLER, EMILY
